login.title: Login
login.error: Error logging in. Please check your username and password.
login.tos: By using PRUNplanner you agree to the {tos_link}.

registration.title: Account Information
registration.tos: PRUNplanner is free to use. By creating an account, you acknowledge and agree to the {tos_link}.

result.ok_message: Registration succesful. You can now login to PRUNplanner.

form.username_info: Must be at least 3 characters long. Can't contain spaces.
form.password_info: Must be at least 8 characters long.
form.email_info: Not mandatory. Increases your account security.
form.question: Enter the name of planet {planet}. To find it, open a new Prosperous Universe buffer with the command {command}. You'll see the planets name listed under 'Name' in the planet information

password_reset.title: Reset your Password
password_reset.info: Please enter the code sent to your email, along with your new password.

form.password_info: Must be at least 8 characters long.

request_password_reset.title: Password Reset Request
request_password_reset.info: Enter the verified email address linked to your PRUNplanner account. If we recognize it, we'll send you a code to reset your password.

verify_email.title: Email Verification
verify_email.info: Please enter the verification code you received via email. Maybe check your spam folder.
